error_signature: container pushing content up with 'Link to'
title: Container content misalignment with 'Link to'
symptom: Using the 'Link to' feature on a container causes the content inside to be pushed up, disrupting the layout. Removing the 'Link to' restores the content to its centered position.
not_this_if: Content remains centered with 'Link to' applied
root_cause: The 'Link to' feature may apply default styles or overrides that affect the container's layout, causing content misalignment. Resetting styles can resolve these unintended effects.
fix_steps: Select the container with the 'Link to' applied
Preview the changes to ensure content is centered
agent_instruction: Reset the styles of the container and reapply the desired settings.
